title: P1.H Constraint-respect assert/judge
description:
## Background
constraints[] only inject into prompt. Need hard/soft proof caller did not violate (e.g. share card).

## Approach
- Outcome type constraint_respected or transcript must_not + optional LLM judge
- Wire goals_met-style pending_judge path if needed
- Unit tests with synthetic events

## Tests

title: P2.A Warm transfer / SIP REFER observe (defer until needed)
description:
## Background
LiveKit WarmTransferTask. Observe-only in lk-sim when agent transfers.

## Approach
Research SIP REFER attrs; events; asserts transfer_started / human joined
Defer implementation until target needs it — bead tracks intent.

## Success
When activated: unit + real transfer scenario if worker supports

title: P1.B AMD / voicemail / machine persona presets
description:
## Background
LiveKit AMD + outbound voicemail. Sim always chats as human today.

## Approach
- State machine option: greeting WAV → beep → silence (minimal Gemini or none until timeout)
- Templates: voicemail_greeting, ivr_menu (with DTMF if A landed)
- Assert agent leave-message / hang / tools
- Research LiveKit AMD docs via Exa before design lock

## Success
Template + runner path unit-tested; real outbound scenario if telephony configured

## Considerations
Product rule: Gemini still 'human' when speech; machine mode is intentional sim of non-human answer

title: Process: branch-from-main + real-report merge gate
description:
## Background
User rule: for each feature/gap, cut a branch from main; after implement, run REAL scenarios; merge to main ONLY when report matches expectation.

## Technical approach (every feature bead must follow)
1. git checkout main && git pull
2. git checkout -b feat/<id>-short-slug (or fix/)
3. Implement + unit tests in lk-sim (and target .agent-sim only if needed)
4. build/typecheck/test green
5. Real execute: lk-sim execute <scenario> --root <voice-ai-worker or target>
6. Inspect reports/<run-id>/summary.json + events + web if needed
7. Merge only if status/assert/script pass as expected (or documented draft waiver)

## Success criteria
- Written checklist used on each feature
- No direct commits to main for multi-file features
- Report path cited in bead close reason

## Considerations
- DTMF scenarios may be draft until worker handles digits — close with draft note, not fake green
- If LiveKit/Gemini flaky: pass@k, then re-research before blaming code
close_reason: Adopted as standing process: every feature branches from main; merge only with real scenario report (or explicit DTMF draft waiver). Documented in bead + WIP.

title: P1.B1 Silent mode (dead caller) + nudge policy

## Background
Coval Silent Mode: never respond; test agent reprompt. Interact with caller_nudge (must not force speech).

## Approach

- Disable barge/noise compile when silent
- caller_nudge skip when silent
- Assert agent reprompt phrases / finals after silence

## Tests
unit nudge skip; compile rules; optional real run
close_reason: PR opened (not merged). silent_mode nudge skip; real silent-mode-nudge-skip gate pass. Await CI + human merge.

title: Epic: Caller realism + CI quality (WIP P1 backlog)
description:
## Background
livekit-agent-simulator (lk-sim) is black-box LiveKit agent QA. P0 behavior + SimLeg telephony modes are done v1. Remaining work is Hamming/Coval-aligned caller interaction taxonomy, DTMF, authoring quality, AMD/silent personas, multi-judge, golden compare, and DID ops. Full research: docs/caller-behavior-research.md, WIP.md.

## Over-arching goals
1. Ship portable core features (no consumer hardcoding in src/).
2. Every feature lands on a branch from main; merge only with real scenario report evidence.
3. Dual-repo smoke: demo-retell-ai-dashboard + voice-ai-worker run in background for real execute.
4. DTMF is implementable in lk-sim as draft/templates; worker may not have GetDtmfTask yet — mark draft, still unit-test sim path.
5. Always: unit tests, build/typecheck, research (Exa + LiveKit MCP + node_modules/.venv) before non-trivial code; ask user if blocked.

## Success
All P1 beads closed with tests green and at least one real report where applicable (or explicit draft waiver for DTMF until worker supports digits).
close_reason: All planned P1 gaps have PRs opened for human review (not auto-merged). Remaining P2 deferred with docs.

title: P1.A DTMF / IVR Script action + events + asserts (DRAFT vs worker)
description:
## Background
LiveKit agents use GetDtmfTask / send_dtmf_events. lk-sim Script lacks dtmf action. **Worker may not implement DTMF yet** — ship sim path as DRAFT: unit tests + template; real E2E merge waiver until worker supports digits. User explicitly: DTMF handle but draft if worker incomplete.

## Research first
Exa + LiveKit DTMF docs + livekit-api CreateSIPParticipant DTMF / data channel; inspect worker node_modules @livekit/agents for DTMF APIs; grep voice-ai-worker for dtmf.

## Technical approach
1. Script action dtmf; digits with w=pause (~0.5s)
2. Emit sim.dtmf / sip.dtmf.sent events
3. Wire publish path for WebRTC and SIP legs (research actual LiveKit API in .venv)
4. Assert.sip or outcome dtmf sequence
5. Templates: ivr-pin-entry.jsonl (draft tag)
6. If worker has no DTMF: document draft; do NOT fake green real report

## Success
- Unit tests for parse + runner + assert
- Real report only if worker responds to digits; else close with draft waiver + unit green
- Branch from main; merge only with evidence or explicit draft note in close reason

## Test plan
- pytest parse, runtime, asserts
- Real execute only when worker ready; else skip merge gate with user-visible draft status

## Considerations
- Portable tones; no Twilio hardcode
- Coordinate with worker later as separate worker bead if needed
close_reason: DRAFT shipped: action=dtmf + publish_dtmf + sim.dtmf + Assert.sip.dtmf_sequence + ivr-pin-entry-draft.jsonl. Unit tests 34 pass. NO real E2E merge to main until worker handles SIP DTMF (only press-digit spoken). Branch feat/p1a-dtmf-script-draft. Research: LiveKit publish_dtmf + sip_dtmf_received.

title: P1.F Typed interruption classes (correction/backchannel/noise/escalate)
description:
## Background
Hamming interruption runbook: barge-in is NOT a boolean. Mid-agent input must be classified so recovery metrics and asserts are meaningful. Research: docs/caller-behavior-research.md C1; WIP P1.F.

## Technical approach
1. Research: Hamming taxonomy + current ScriptStep/Behavior compile/events.
2. Add optional `class` on ScriptStep / Behavior barge fields: correction | backchannel | noise | dtmf | silence | escalate.
3. Behavior: barge_ins (correction default), backchannels[] (barge_in=false), false_interrupts[].
4. Emit class on sim.script.cue / interruption events; behavior_summary by class.
5. Web chips optional follow-up (P1.L).
6. Unit tests: compile snapshots + evaluate recovery only for correction class.

## Success criteria
- Backchannel does not set barge_in recovery path by default
- correction still drives recovery assert
- noise class emits distinct event metadata
- pytest green; branch from main; real scenario optional if only metadata (prefer one character-impatient run)

## Test plan
- tests/test_behavior_compile.py class fields
- tests/test_script.py / asserts recovery with class
- Manual: execute character-impatient, inspect events.jsonl for class

## Considerations
- Portable: no consumer tool names
- DTMF class can exist before DTMF action lands (metadata only) or land with P1.A
- Do not break existing scenarios (class optional, default correction for barge_in=true)
close_reason: Implemented interrupt_class; 43 unit tests pass; real execute agent-interrupt-barge gate pass; behavior_summary.by_class correction:3. Branch feat/p1f-typed-interruption-classes. Report under voice-ai-worker/.agent-sim/reports/

description:
## Background
Hamming false_positive: keyboard click should not count as successful barge recovery.

## Depends on

- false_interrupts[] → class=noise, short asset, barge_in semantics that do not satisfy recovery min

## Tests
Unit + events fixture evaluation.

title: Process: research-before-code + test/build gates
description:
## Background
AGENTS.md research loop is mandatory for non-trivial changes.

## Loop
Hypothesis → Exa (web_search/fetch) → LiveKit MCP if available → .venv (livekit, google-genai) and/or worker node_modules (@livekit/agents) → src fix → pytest/vitest → real scenario if surface-touching

## Always before close
- Unit tests for new logic
- pytest (lk-sim) or pnpm test/typecheck (worker/dashboard)
- If stuck after research: ASK user — do not invent business rules/env

## Success
Bead descriptions reference this process; implementers do not skip research on SDK/wire formats.
close_reason: Adopted as standing process: Exa + LiveKit MCP + .venv/node_modules research before non-trivial code; unit tests + build required; ask user if blocked.

title: Process: dual-repo dev servers (dashboard + worker) always available
description:
## Background
Real lk-sim execute needs a running LiveKit agent worker registered with agent_name, and usually the dashboard for agent config/dispatch metadata.

## Repos
- Dashboard: /Users/tranquangdang21/Projects/livekit/demo-retell-ai-dashboard — Next.js, `pnpm dev` (check package.json scripts)
- Worker: /Users/tranquangdang21/Projects/livekit/voice-ai-worker — `pnpm dev` (build + agent.js dev)

## Technical approach
1. Ensure .env present (do not invent secrets — ask if missing).
2. Start both in background; log PIDs / ports.
3. Verify worker registered (LiveKit) and dashboard responds.
4. Keep running across feature branches; restart only if crash.

## Success criteria
- Worker process healthy and accepts dispatch
- Dashboard HTTP up
- Document how to re-run in bead comment if ports conflict

## Test plan
- curl dashboard health/home
- Confirm worker logs show registration
- Optional: lk-sim preflight against voice-ai-worker .agent-sim

## Considerations
- Do not commit secrets
- Use existing .env; if missing keys, ASK user
- Research worker AGENTS.md: plan-first for worker features
close_reason: Dashboard http://localhost:3000 (Next 15 turbo) + worker voice-ai-worker-local registered AW_CfkVR79bnm8i on LiveKit Cloud. Logs: /tmp/lk-dev-logs/dashboard.log worker.log

title: Process: one-gap-one-PR merge gate (tests+build+real report; portable core)
description:
## Standing process (user 2026-07-14)

**One gap / one feature = one PR into main.** No bundling, no silent merge of multiple beads.

### Merge-ready PR requires ALL of:
1. **Unit tests** green for the change (`uv run pytest` relevant + full suite before merge)
2. **Build** green (`uv sync` / package importable; web build if web touched)
3. **Real execute** against a **running** LiveKit agent (any black-box target via `--root <target>/.agent-sim`) with a **real report** under `reports/<run-id>/` where status/assert/script gate matches expectation
4. **Portable core** — AGENTS.md: never hardcode worker/dashboard/product keys in `src/`. Target is only a smoke root; core must work for any LiveKit agent.

### Explicitly forbidden
- Fitting core logic to voice-ai-worker or any one monorepo
- Merging without real report when the surface is runtime (script/assert/telephony/persona)
- Fake-green reports (e.g. DTMF when agent never consumes digits)
- Multiple features in one PR

### Draft PRs
Allowed when E2E cannot be honest yet (e.g. DTMF until some target handles SIP DTMF). Draft must say what is missing; not merge until real report exists.

### Branch naming
`feat/<bead-or-id>-short-slug` from latest main.
close_reason: Documented in WIP.md PR/merge process; enforced going forward: one gap one PR; tests+build+real report; portable core.
